message.content:
@startuml
participant "Usuário" as U1
participant "Usuário" as U2

participant "boundary" as B1
participant "control" as C1

participant "boundary" as B2
participant "control" as C2

participant "Equipes" as E1
participant ":Equipo" as E2

participant "Equipes" as E3
participant ":Equipo" as E4

U1 ..> B1 : expelTeam(data)
U2 ..> B2 : expelTeam(data)

B1 ..> C1 : expelTeam(data)
C1 ..> E1 : expelTeam(data)
E1 ..> E2 : expelTeam(data)

B2 ..> C2 : expelTeam(data)
C2 ..> E3 : expelTeam(data)
E3 ..> E4 : expelTeam(data)

@enduml
